data.param: {"input":"{\"image_input\":[],\"aspect_ratio\":\"21:9\",\"output_format\":\"png\",\"prompt\":\"Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.\\nRole: cover.\\nPurpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance..\\nDiagram type: stage_evolution.\\nConcept summary: Mamba-3 这次最关键的变化，不是再讲训练提速，而是把注意力从“怎么更快预训练”转向“怎么在不加推理延迟的前提下，把质量继续往上推”。.\\nStyle direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first.\\nBackground: warm cream paper-like background.\\nPrimary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.\\nLine work: soft dark gray line work.\\nScene elements: 3-4 stage panels, left-to-right arrows, evolution markers.\\nKey relationships to visualize: show progression across stages, make the shift in logic visually obvious.\\nLayout pattern: diagram_left_text_right.\\nDiagram focus: single central system diagram.\\nText position: right.\\nOn-canvas headline: \\\"真正值得盯的不是“Mamba 又更新了”，而是有人开始认真重写推理…\\\".\\nOn-canvas subheadline: \\\"Mamba-3 这次最关键的变化，不是再讲训练提速，而是把注意力从“怎么更快预训练”转…\\\".\\nMust have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, wide editorial banner, clean empty space, flat shapes with restrained accents, short labels only.\\nMust avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, no photorealism, no dense paragraphs in image, no random sci-fi effects.\\nAdditional direction: Turn the article's main judgment into a single visual system. Source context: Gorden_Sun.\\nThe result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.\\nKeep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.\",\"resolution\":\"2K\"}","model":"nano-banana-2"}
